notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the nodejs SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 14 CVEs: CVE-2023-32002, CVE-2023-32006, CVE-2023-32559, CVE-2023-44487, CVE-2023-30581, and 9 more.
